x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: OT change request volume reflects the frequency of operational technology changes that benefit from AI-assisted risk assessment and approval workflows. Now Assist can analyze change descriptions and flag potential OT system impacts.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Ensure OT change requests are being managed through the OTSM module.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_5e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851c3f
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[OT change request volume reflects the frequency of operational technology changes that benefit from AI-assisted risk assessment and approval workflows. Now Assist can analyze change descriptions and flag potential OT system impacts.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>OT Change Request Volume</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("sn_ot_change_request");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=20)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" changes",finding:c+" OT change requests found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" changes",finding:c+" OT change requests found."};
return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:"0 changes",finding:"No OT change requests found."};
})()]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>OTSM</module>
<number>CHK0006176</number>
<order/>
<remediation_guidance>Ensure OT change requests are being managed through the OTSM module.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>5e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851c3f</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
